primary_source_citation.paper_title: PubMedQA: A Dataset for Biomedical Research Question Answering

native_context_field_semantics.contexts: contains the structured abstract excluding its conclusion
native_context_field_semantics.final_decision: is the agreed yes/no/maybe ground-truth decision
native_context_field_semantics.reasoning_required_pred: preserves the annotation made using question and context
native_context_field_semantics.reasoning_free_pred: preserves the annotation made using question, context, and long_answer
native_context_field_semantics.meshes: are document-topic metadata derived from Medical Subject Headings

rules: preserve every entry
preserve source order
preserve text exactly at the source-record layer
do not summarize, rewrite, split, merge, or deduplicate
duplicate text entries remain separate segments with distinct ordinals
context text is source-provided context, not a gold rationale
1_contexts.supersedes: prior generic instruction to deduplicate context entries

rules: labels represent structured-abstract section metadata
labels are not classification labels
labels are not sentence-level evidence labels
labels are not gold rationales
preserve exact source values
require len(labels) == len(contexts) during P01-03E
any cardinality mismatch must fail closed
do not insert, infer, or synthesize missing labels
2_labels.positional_pairing: not executed during P01-03D; this stage records the policy only

rules: treat them as document-level topic metadata
preserve exact values and source order
do not convert them into evidence objects
do not treat them as targets or rationales
exclude them from the default Pilot-01 model input
retain them in the internal source record for provenance and later controlled analysis
preserve source values and multiplicity
treat as a native human-annotation trace
do not rename it as a model prediction
do not use it as the target decision
do not use it as a model input
do not use it in scoring or training
do not collapse the list to a scalar without a later verified cardinality rule
preserve source values and multiplicity
treat as a native human-annotation trace produced with long_answer available
do not use it as the target decision
do not use it as a model input
do not use it in scoring or training
do not collapse the list to a scalar without a later verified cardinality rule

6_final_decision.definition: the only native consensus target decision
rules: maybe must not be converted to abstain
neither reasoning annotation trace overrides final_decision
disagreement analysis is outside P01-03D

7_long_answer.definition: the native conclusion and answer text
rules: retain it in the internal source record
exclude it from reasoning-required model input
its use in reasoning-free or auxiliary-supervision experiments requires a separately defined experiment configuration
do not derive claims or rationales from it during P01-03D

updated_internal_model.note: PilotRecord remains the only public contract root. This is an internal Layer-1 representation.

internal_source_record_hash_policy.note: This internal hash does not change or replace the public PilotRecord content-hash contract.

label_leakage_boundary.section_labels_policy: retained as metadata; including them in a model input requires an explicit experiment configuration and must not occur implicitly

fail_closed_invariants: invalid annotation-trace values when validation is performed
any implicit use of auxiliary annotations as model features or targets
